title: New Item Automation

posts.author: GH2021 (Gabi Hawthorne)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to set up the following automation:
"When an item is created in the board, create an item in another board and connect them in the selected board.
I’m not sure where I’m going wrong, the item is created in the another board location but it disappears from the original board. Any suggestions?
Many thanks.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@GH2021,

That automation should not have anything to do with an item being removed.

I would recommend contacting support with your issue at support@monday.com.
